meaning: n.(报刊上报道体育比赛结果的)分数栏
examples: The team did not play as badly as the scoreline suggests.
Before the game, 7 of Paraguay's last 9 wins had been by a 1-0 scoreline.
Meanwhile, Porto coach Jesualdo Ferreira felt Tuesday's scoreline was not a fair reflection of the match.
Three goals followed before a late penalty for Greece made the scoreline more respectable but flattering.
